case_title: ZILOU SITU VS. BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO,INC,A CALIFORNIA CO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SITU, ZILOU AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO,INC,A CALIFORNIA CO RPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SITU, ZILOU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA DISPLAY SAN FRANCISCO,INC,A CALIFORNIA CO RPORATION $3,333.16 PRINCIPAL, $23.19 INTEREST, $135.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,491.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
